name: browzer
description: AI agent skills to empower it with Browzer — hybrid vector + Graph RAG for codebases and document workspaces. Twenty-three skills around the `browzer` CLI: RAG (embed-workspace-graphs, embed-documents, explore-workspace-graphs, semantic-search, dependency-graph, ingestion-jobs), workflow (brainstorming → generate-prd → generate-task → execute-task → code-review → receiving-code-review → write-tests → update-docs → feature-acceptance → commit → sync-workspace), orchestration (orchestrate-task-delivery), ops (auth-status, workspace-management), and tools (use-rag-cli, browzer-bootstraper, find-skills). Code-review spawns 4 mandatory parallel agents — senior-engineer (cyclomatic + DRY + clean code), software-architect (system design + race conditions + caching + perf), qa (regressions + edge cases + butterfly-effect), regression-tester (scoped tests over modified files + browzer deps). Receiving-code-review then closes EVERY finding with a 7-step ladder (sonnet → research → opus → research → log to tech-debt) for zero-tech-debt by default. Write-tests authors green coverage AND runs Stryker/mutmut/go-mutesting in the same pass against the final post-fix state.

BROWZER_SERVER.title: Browzer server URL
BROWZER_SERVER.description: Base URL of the Browzer gateway (e.g. https://browzeremb.com or http://localhost:8080).

BROWZER_API_KEY.title: Browzer API key
BROWZER_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for non-interactive login. If unset, run `browzer login` once interactively.
